title: ChangeConfigurationResponse
description: Response to a change-configuration request with per-key status. If any key is Rejected or NotSupported, the station MUST NOT apply any changes (atomic all-or-nothing).

results.description: Per-key results in the same order as the request keys array

errorCode.description: OSPP error code (present when status is Rejected or NotSupported)

errorText.description: Machine-readable error name (present when status is Rejected or NotSupported)
